college_info.intro:
JIS Institute of Advanced Studies and Research offers postgraduate, certificate and PhD programmes in several disciplines. The popular programmes at JISIASR include MSc and MTech, offered at the PG level. Most of the MSc and MTech courses are offered in full-time mode, for a duration of two years. The MSc programme is offered in various specialisations such as Microbiology, Paint & Coating Technology, Polymer Science & Technology, Chemistry, and others. Whereas, the MTech programme is offered in several branches such as Computer Science & Engineering and Data Science, among others.
JISIASR offers a research-based and industry-centric curriculum to prepare students for all the industry challenges. The institute boasts state-of-the-art laboratories for advanced research and offers strong placement assistance to students. The JIS Institute of Advanced Research and Studies collaborates with many academic institutes and industries to organise various academic training programmes and to generate internship opportunities for students.
Students can explore the listed programs offered by JISIASR for the 2025-26 academic session and embark on your journey to a future-proof career in the industry or academia.
Candidates can check the JISIASR popular programmes along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: JIS Institute of Advanced Studies and Research provides numerous PG, diploma and PhD programmes in the streams of Data Science, Health Science & Technology, Interdisciplinary Sciences, and Renewable & Sustainable Energy Studies. At the PG level, JISIASR offers MSc and MTech programmes in various specialisations. Through its different centres, the institute offers a PhD programme in several areas of research such as bioinformatics, microbiology, medicinal chemistry, renewable energy & applications, and data science applications, among others. Some of the popular MSc specialisations offered at JISIASR Kolkata are mentioned below:

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seat intake of PhD courses at JISIASR, JIS University is 40. The institute offers over ten specialisations under PhD courses. Candidates should pass MSc/MTech/BTech or other relevant degrees are eligible to apply for admission. After the fulfillment of the eligibility criteria, candidates have to visit the official website of JIS Institute of Advanced Studies and Research to apply online.
faqs.question: What is the seat intake for PhD at JISIASR, JIS University?

faqs.answer: A:    No, JISIASR, JIS University requires at least 50% aggregate in MSc/BE/BTech/MTech/MPharm. If any student passes another entrance-level exam related to the field, they are also eligible for the course. The institute accepts various National Level Exams for admission to PhD courses including SIR/UGC/DBT/ICMR/GATE/INSPIRE/ JGEEBILS / RGNF.So if any candidates want admission to JIS Institute of Advanced Studies and Research for PhD course they must have 50% in under graduation or post-graduation degree.
faqs.question: Can I do a PhD with 40% graduation in JISIASR, JIS University?

faqs.answer: A:    No, there is no entrance exam needed for admission to JISIASR, JIS University. The institute offers merit-based admission. If applicants want admission to PG courses they must complete graduation degree with 50% aggregate. Additionally,  applicants who want admission to PhD courses in the JIS Institute of Advanced Studies and Research must have MSc/ MTech/ BTech or equivalent with a 50% aggregate score. Further, the college also accepts various National Levels exams which include CSIR/UGC/DBT/ICMR/GATE/INSPIRE/ JGEEBILS / RGNF.

reviews_list.review_title: Amazing faculty, research focused curriculum, state of the art infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Everyone in my group got either great internship options with an option to hire or was provided with good research opportunities. The highest package in terms of the internship was around 3.6 lpa. Most of the recruiting were done by vista intelligence Pvt Limited.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is outfitted with Wi-Fi as well as fully airconditioned classrooms. The labs have well-maintained computers, software, and a number of other equipment. The labs are well developed and maintained and there is a pantry available but sadly no canteen options for the time being.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is a great college with the best faculty members from ISI and IIT.

You get an average salary of Rs. 40,000 to 60,000 per month after completing the course from this institute, which is very good for freshers to start in the market.
review_content.Infrastructure: The institute is centrally air-conditioned, and they have an awesome infrastructure. You get good access to all books from the library, and the labs are decently maintained with the latest technology both in the data science and biotech side. Faculty members and infrastructure are good, which is required for any student.

review_summary.college_name: JISIASR Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Polymer Science and Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a unique research institute in eastern India, and it provides huge opportunities.

content.Placements: Institute is relatively new, but it has got tie-ups with premier institutes and universities in India and abroad like IIT Kharagpur, Mahatma Gandhi University, Pohang Institute of Technology, South Korea, etc., and other Industries like IPA, rubber industries, pharmaceutical industries, etc. So there are high chances of getting placed in these reputed industries and universities after completion of the course. Some students already got placed as research interns.
content.Infrastructure: Laboratories are well-equipped with high tech instruments which are helpful for students and researchers to carry out their research works. The institute is well-equipped with computer labs and wet labs. Classrooms are good here. There is a centralised Wi-Fi system. The JIS University have dedicated hostels for their students, and there are a lot of PGs in the vicinity of the institute at Salt Lake. So, finding any living accommodations would not be an issue here.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Polymer Science and Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The college has really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: The placements are quite good here. The college has collaborations with national and international universities and industries like IITs, IPA, and MG University. It also has collaboration with different Korean universities. They provide internships also.
content.Infrastructure: The institute is well structured. Labs with modern instruments and classrooms with modern facilities are available. High-speed Wi-Fi is available. Labs have hi-tech, new and costly instruments. There is also an online and offline library. Overall, it is very good.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Amazing faculty, research focused curriculum, state of the art infrastructure.

content.Placements: Everyone in my group got either great internship options with an option to hire or was provided with good research opportunities. The highest package in terms of the internship was around 3.6 lpa. Most of the recruiting were done by vista intelligence Pvt Limited.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is outfitted with Wi-Fi as well as fully airconditioned classrooms. The labs have well-maintained computers, software, and a number of other equipment. The labs are well developed and maintained and there is a pantry available but sadly no canteen options for the time being.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is a great college with the best faculty members from ISI and IIT.

content.Placements: Placements are 100%, and already 1st-year students got selected for internships in a data science-based company. You get an average salary of Rs. 40,000 to 60,000 per month after completing the course from this institute, which is very good for freshers to start in the market.
content.Infrastructure: The institute is centrally air-conditioned, and they have an awesome infrastructure. You get good access to all books from the library, and the labs are decently maintained with the latest technology both in the data science and biotech side. Faculty members and infrastructure are good, which is required for any student.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Medical Biotechnology and Bioinformatics - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The teaching faculty and supporting staff are excellent.

content.Placements: The companies having MoUs with our institute include Tata Medical Centre, and also academic institutes like IIT Kharagpur, IIEST Shibpur etc. Relatively, all the students are given internships. The roles offered in the course include quality control, HPLC handling, wet lab technician, sequencing operator etc.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are equipped with all the essential features required for smart learning. The whole institute is enabled with high-speed Wi-Fi. Both the books and hard copies of any part of the course are available in the library. All kinds of medical first-line help is available.

college_info.intro:
JD Institute of Fashion Technology Dehradun offers a wide range of courses including Undergraduate, Diploma, Advanced Diploma, and Certification programmes in the disciplines of Fashion and Interior Design, Jewellery Design, Communication Design, Pattern Making Technology, and Garment Manufacturing Technology, among others.
At the UG level, JDIFT Dehradun offers BSc and BFD programmes in various branches such as Fashion Design and Interior Design. The BSc programme offered by the college is highly popular due to its promising career prospects. JDIFT Dehradun follows an industry-aligned curriculum to help students gain practical knowledge with deep digital insights. The college has also established multiple partnerships to regularly organise industry-driven training and certification programmes, internship opportunities, and industry visits for students. Below mentioned are the popular JD Institute of Fashion Technology Dehradun courses, along with fees and eligibility:

Furthermore, the JD Institute of Fashion Technology Dehradun average package stood at INR 3.21 LPA. admission_overview.college_name: JD Institute of Fashion Technology Dehradun Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fee, Application & Selection

paragraphs: JDIFT Dehradun admissionsare merit-based. The institute offers 12 courses at UG and diploma levels in Fashion and Interior Design. The courses include BFD, UG Fashion Design, UG Interior Design, Advance Diploma and Diploma. Interested candidates can apply online forJD Institute of Fashion Technology Dehradun.

The institute considers the merit of the candidates for admission. Aspirants need to fulfil the eligibility criteria set for the applied course. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. Below areJDIFT coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

JD Institute of Fashion Technology offers admission to candidates who fulfil both eligibility and selection requirements. Aspirants have to apply online for the preferred course. Below are the steps to get a seat in JDIFT:
STEP 1: JDIFT Application Process 2025

Aspirants can apply on the institute website. Candidates need to register with an application fee of INR 1,103. Candidates have to fill out the application form, upload documents and pay a registration fee to complete the application process.
STEP 2: Selection

The institute selects candidates based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants may also need to appear for General Aptitude Test or GAT for UG degree courses. The institute may also conduct a personal interview round for final selection.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once the selection is over, aspirants are informed about their admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to payJDIFT Dehradun feeto confirm their seat in the institute.

review_summary.college_name: Swaminarayan University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Honest review of college.

content.Placements: It is a graduation course, so you don't get direct placement. You are just pursuing your degree, and I am in the medical field, so there is no direct placement. After getting the degree, you can pursue an MD, work in a hospital, or establish your own clinic.
content.Infrastructure: The college has the best, in fact, great infrastructure, with a 7-floor building and two lifts. It also has a big classroom equipped with projectors. The campus has one large central library that is well-equipped with books, and every classroom has an AC in working condition.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc in Organic Chemistry - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: About infrastructure and facility you can SEE in our photos.

content.Placements: About 70% of students were placed in our colleges, and the highest package of our internship and job is about 45 to 50k, while the lowest one is 15k to 20k, and the average is about 35k. I am studying M.Sc. Chemistry, that's why chemical companies prefer me. About 70% of placements are placed by our colleges.
content.Infrastructure: Water supply, solar system, coolers, etc. Medical facilities are good for emergency purposes, and regarding sports, we have a TT table and gymnasium for physical workouts. Healthy food is provided by our mess. There are 2 to 3 messes in our campus for lunch and dinner.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. In Microbiology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The best and experience college.

content.Placements: 82 students are placed in BSC in microbiology. Highest package is 3 lakh and lowest package is 2 lakhs. Many roles in microbiology faculty. In class, good spoken English skills communication skills develop.
content.Infrastructure: Many facilities and infrastructure are available BSC in microbiology such as wi-fi, best lab technology, very Big class room and library. Hostel is very best and experienced. Mess is there in hostel but they do not not add garlic and onion in food. Cricket, volleyball, football ground is available.
content.Faculty: B.Sc. in Microbiology faculty is helpful. They provide notes and books. The faculty members are qualified with Ph.D. and other degrees. The teaching quality is very good. Faculty are knowledgeable and smart. Students are ready for industry. I like the confidence in Microbiology very easy and they have good spoken English skills.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Some of the faculty members were violent and did misbehaviour.

content.Placements: None of the students got placed as the college did not conduct any placement programs. So none of the candidates got placed at that time as per my knowledge. Average students were getting their internship after the completion of course because they may not have enough contacts.
content.Infrastructure: The college doesn't provide Wi-Fi facility. Labs are not equipped with enough instruments. Labs are not properly managed. Classrooms did not have proper seating arrangements. There was no sufficient place for reading in the library, but they managed it.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc in Microbiology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College that can provide a course of your dreams and really good infrastructure and faculty.

content.Placements: Around 20% of students may get placements from the college. The highest package is around Rs. 25,000, the lowest is Rs. 17,000, and the average is Rs. 20,000. Companies like Denis Chemist Lab and Abarish Pharma visit for placements. The college does not help in getting internships. Roles offered include quality analysis and quality control.
content.Infrastructure: They provide computer labs, free Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, lifts to reach the top floor, and parking space for personal vehicles. In our hostel, there is a gym and an outdoor ground to play in the evening, and the food quality is very good. They also provide a cricket ground and a football ground for playing.

paragraphs: Swaminarayan Universityadmission 2026is open for all courses. The university offers courses such as B.E/BTech., BBA, BHMS, M.E, MBA, etc at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers PhD, Diploma and Certificate courses. Admissions are entrance-based as per respective courses. Candidates must meet the eligibility set by the university.

Swaminarayan University course admissionis completely entrance-based. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the university must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. Applicants need to register and appear for the accepted entrance exam before applying for the course. Download:Swaminarayan University Brochure 2026

Swaminarayan University admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Swaminarayan University is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Swaminarayan University Application Process 2026

The application mode is online. For admission to the various programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website, https://admission.swaminarayanuniversity.ac.in/. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website.
STEP 2: Selection

The university considers various entrance exam scores, such as NEET, PhD entrance exam, etc, for admission to the MBBS, PhD course among courses. Post selection criteria, students must visit the university campus for the counselling process. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification. Aspirants need t pay theSwaminarayan University feeto confirm their seats at the university.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Hotel Management and Catering Science - Batch of 2013
reviews_list.review_title: My college life was a mix of all phases. It gave me good exposure with amazing memories to cherish.

review_content.Placements: The placement cell at our college was pretty decent and maximum students got placements from college to the best reputed hotels like The Oberoi's New Delhi, The Leela palace Chennai, lemon tree hotels, Marriott and The Taj were the main hotels that visited our college. In the year 2013, 70% of the students got their placements with the in hand salary till 17k which was great as a fresher. We also had options to apply else where part from our the hotels that visited. In the 2nd year of our curriculum our year was divided into two halves, where the first 6 months we had classroom training and the remaining months it was a mandate to have an industrial training exposure. We all were given choices and preferences according to our hometowns to choose hotels so that we can stay at home and compete the internship. As I live in Noida I preferred to stay in Delhi and complete my training and hence I completed my industrial trading from The Shangrila Eros hotel at New Delhi in the year 2012. It helped me to choose my area of specialisation and gave the exposure of the actual hoteliers life. We were trainees who worked as normal employees and got stipend of 700rps a month which varied hotels to hotels. It was mandate to work in all the departments, so that we learn their role and to give makes us realise we're we can fit in and which is the best suited role.

review_summary.college_name: Oriental School of Hotel Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Hospitality and Hotel Administration - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I would not recommend students to take admission in it.

content.Placements: Around 20% of students were placed in our course. The highest salary offered was Rs 20,000, and the lowest salary offered was Rs 12,000. The top recruiting companies were Taj and Shangri la. There were not many students who got placements or internships. The top role was associate level in every department.
content.Infrastructure: The outer infrastructure looks were excellent. But internally it was all messed up. All cheap quality doors were fitted, in classrooms, benches were like of old village government school's. There was no Wi-Fi facility, laboratories were outdated. The hostel was not good. There were no fans, bunker beds provided with low-quality matters and pillows, water supply, and for closet flush water connection was disabled. The food served was not good, if non-vegetarian or some good dish was there in the menu, and it was rationed that only one time it was being served to one student.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Hotel Management and Catering Science - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Oriental School of Hotel Management is the best college.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are very poor and some faculty members behave very rudely. They only provide a few placements, and the placements are all over India. They are not bothered about students' future, and they are only interested in collecting money from students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities in Oriental School of Hotel management are very good. They provide well-maintained libraries, classrooms, etc. The hostel facilities are also very good, but hostel food is very poor. But the hostel facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Hospitality and Hotel Administration - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It provides better campus interviews with practical classes, and skilled faculty members.

content.Placements: It provides better campus interviews, better practical classes, and skilled faculty members. The placements cell plays a crucial role in locating job opportunities for undergraduates and postgraduates passing out from the college by keeping in touch with reputed firms and industrial establishments. The placements cell operates round the year to facilitate contacts between companies and graduates. The number of students placed through the campus interviews is continuously rising. On invitation, many reputed industries visit the institute to conduct interviews.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Hotel Management and Catering Science - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: My college life was a mix of all phases. It gave me good exposure with amazing memories to cherish.

content.Placements: The placement cell at our college was pretty decent and maximum students got placements from college to the best reputed hotels like The Oberoi's New Delhi, The Leela palace Chennai, lemon tree hotels, Marriott and The Taj were the main hotels that visited our college. In the year 2013, 70% of the students got their placements with the in hand salary till 17k which was great as a fresher. We also had options to apply else where part from our the hotels that visited. In the 2nd year of our curriculum our year was divided into two halves, where the first 6 months we had classroom training and the remaining months it was a mandate to have an industrial training exposure. We all were given choices and preferences according to our hometowns to choose hotels so that we can stay at home and compete the internship. As I live in Noida I preferred to stay in Delhi and complete my training and hence I completed my industrial trading from The Shangrila Eros hotel at New Delhi in the year 2012. It helped me to choose my area of specialisation and gave the exposure of the actual hoteliers life. We were trainees who worked as normal employees and got stipend of 700rps a month which varied hotels to hotels. It was mandate to work in all the departments, so that we learn their role and to give makes us realise we're we can fit in and which is the best suited role.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Hospitality and Hotel Administration - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best college in Kerala. It owns best hotel management college in Kerala 8 times.

content.Placements: The placements in our college are not 100%, but 99%. Most of the students have got placements, while some of them got entry-level, and some of the students have got the higher positions in the hotel industry. The hotel chains in India like TAJ GROUP, OBERAI GROUP, and intercontinental hotels etc., have come for the placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is spread across 28 acres of land. The classrooms are different, and we have one library. The college provides Wi-Fi facilities, and we have two computer labs. We have two different restaurants, and more than three kitchens are available for practicals. We have separate housekeeping department etc.
